title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 50.337 - Governing body may provide for pension plan for county employees (first class counties)
text:
50.337.  Governing body may provide for pension plan for county employees (first class counties). — The governing body of any county of the first class is hereby authorized by order or otherwise to provide for the pensioning of all county employees and widows and minor children of deceased employees and to appropriate and utilize its revenues and other available funds for such purposes.
(L. 1965 p. 155 § 1)
